rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to upload a new request.
The system shall enable a BPO organization to save the details of a project.
The system shall allow a client to search for a suitable project category.
The system shall enable an BPO organization to accept or decline a request from a client.
The system shall allow a client to decide whether to proceed with an accepted project or reject it.
The system shall update the project status after acceptance by both parties.
The system shall allow a client to track the progress of a project.
The system shall enable an BPO organization to update the progress of a project.
The system shall upload a final project once work is completed.
The system shall perform a quality check on the final project.
The system shall restart the process if a client is unsatisfied with the final project.
The system shall make payment if the client is satisfied with the final project.
The system shall deliver the project after payment.
The system shall allow a client to provide a rating for the completed project.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can upload a new request.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When a person is dealing with a project, they can either upload a new request or respond to an existing one.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A BPO organization can save the details of a project.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is a BPO organization, they enter the project details and save them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A client can search for a suitable project category.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is a client, they first search for a suitable project category.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: An BPO organization can accept or decline a request from a client.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Then, the BPO organization can either accept or decline the request. If it is declined, it ends there.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A client can decide to proceed with an accepted project or reject it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the BPO accepts, the client then decides whether to proceed or reject it. If the client rejects it, it ends.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The project status is updated after acceptance by both parties.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the project status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A client can track the progress of a project.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The client may choose to track the progress, while the BPO organization can update the progress.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: An BPO organization can update the progress of a project.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The client may choose to track the progress, while the BPO organization can update the progress.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A final project is uploaded once work is completed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the work is completed, the final project is uploaded.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A quality check is performed on the final project.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A quality check is done. If the client is not satisfied, the process continues again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a client is unsatisfied with the final project, the process restarts.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the client is not satisfied, the process continues again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Payment is made if the client is satisfied with the final project.
The project is delivered after payment.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After payment, the project is delivered.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A client can provide a rating for the completed project.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Then it ends. After that, the client provides a rating.
